details.IncidentDetail: "[13] [Appended, 17:41:32] [1] LEFT TURN ARROW TO ONR HAS BEEN STUCK ON RED FOR OVER 15 MINUTES "
"[8] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1166-Defective Traffic Signals to DOT-Request CalTrans Notify by CHP"
"[6] ^1039 CT643; WILL HAVE SOMEONE ENRT TO TROUBLESHOOT "
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-^CCTV -- WATCHED THE EB FRIARS TO I-8/SB 15 LEFT TURN ARROW (TO ACC THE LOOP RAMP) SKIP AT LEAST 2 CYCLES / WILL BE WORKING ON CALL OUT"
"[1] LEFT TURN SIGNAL TO TURN ONTO SB 15/EB 8 ONR IS STUCK ON RED"
"[45] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1181-Trfc Collision-Minor Inj [Shared]"
"[23] ^CCTV -- TRFC SLOWING ON THE EB SIDE AT PICADOR U/C [Shared]"
"[19] ^CCTV -- APPEARS TO BE WB 905 JWO PICADOR, POSS THE DEL SUR BLVD U/C // VEH IN THE WIDE CENTER MEDIAN; UNABLE TO SEE IF ANY LNS ARE BLOCKED [Shared]"
"[13] VEH WAS OCCUPED BY 2 XRAY DRIVER AND 5 YOA CHILD [Shared]"
"[8] [Appended, 15:59:58] [1] SOLO VEH O/TURNED / LANDED BACK ON ITS WHEELS"
"[1] GRY BMW WAS AT HIGH RATE OF SPEED / POSS HIT THE MEDIAN / FLEW IN THE AIR and LANDED IN THE CD"
"[16] DECLINED 1141 - WAS REAR ENDED, HIGH BLOOD PRESSURE DUE TO BEING AFRAID BECAUSE OF THE TC "
"[6] 85-4 WILL BE ENRT WHEN PATROL VEH IS PREP'D"

"[23] [Rotation Request Comment] ****1039 BEACH AND SON TOW - 760-352-8009 CPZ LINE 22***"
"[22] B85-003 ROLL 1185 PK TK BACK WHEELS ON THE DITCH BANK, WILL PROBABLY NEED A REG RIG FB MAY NOT BE ABLE TO PULL OUT AT THAT ANGLE "
"[16] NO OTHER VEHS THERE NOW BUT AT SOME POINT THEY WERE TRYING TO GET VEH OUT "
"[15] WILL CAUSE DAMAGE TO GET OUT VEH "
"[14] PER THE RP THEY WERE TRYING TO GET VEH OUT W/ OTHER VEHS SO THEY WEDGED THE VEH INTO CANAL BANK"
"[12] ITS QUARTER MI JWO BW RD // BTWN MELOLAND AND BW"
"[12] B85-005 ALL TRAFFIC DIVERTED TO SR7 [Shared]"

"[16] 1039 SBSO - WILL RECALL TO ADVS IF THEY CAN SEND A DEPUTY TO VICTIM"
"[13] RP NOW ADVS HIS VEH PART 1125 / HAZARDS ON"
"[12] RP WILL TRY TO ARRANGE 1185 THROUGH INSURANCE"
"[9] UNK IF OBJ RP HIT IS STILL 1125"
"[5] OBJ FEEL OFF THE TRLR OF SV - RP HIT THE OBJ AND SV LEFT"
"[4] UNK OBJ WAS IN RP'S LANE / RP HIT THE OBJ AND TOTALED HIS TK"
"[3] VEH WAS WB - RP WAS EB"
"[1] MALE PTY WALKING DOWN THE MIDDLE OF THE RD WITH A CAD"
"[15] C72-003 W/ VEH REQ 1185 JEO MM 34"
"[13] RP ADVS HE TRIED TO MOVE VEH O/O THE RDWY BUT DUE TO LACK OF SHOULDER - VEH PART IN THE RDWY"
"[12] RP COPIES IF VEH IS 1125 IT WILL BE TOWED / RP COPIES - RP WILL CONTACT MR K AT A LATER TIME REGARDING ARRANGEMENTS ON GETTING HIS VEH BACK"
"[11] RP'S INSURANCE NOT ABLE TO SEND 1185 UNTIL 0800 TOMORROW MORNING"
"[10] VEH IS WB ON THE E/SIDE OF WESTGARD PASS"
